_doc.what: Editorial overlay for docs/guide/ecosystem-map.html. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF EDITORIAL TRUTH for the interactive map. gen-ecosystem-map.cjs merges this hand-maintained copy with SSOT-derived facts (command SET from commands/**/*.md frontmatter, artifact SET from docs/pmo/artifacts/, counts from validation.md) and injects the result as DATA into the template.
_doc.split: SSOT (do NOT duplicate here, generator fills): the command SET itself (which commands exist), command description/argument-hint frontmatter, artifact catalog membership (24 ids), validation canonical count, gate source-file existence, _build stamp. EDITORIAL (this file owns): per-command {status, st, when(ru), arg, tags, produces, consumes, ro, source}; per-artifact {tier, cardinality, lineageFrom, lineageTo}; pipeline lanes; module meta; gates list; processes list; validation group summary; glossary; tasks (goal->command); roadmap (planned items).
_doc.rules: Every commands/**/*.md MUST have a commands[] entry here and vice-versa (generator --check fails otherwise). produces/consumes ids MUST be artifact ids or declared boundaryObjects. command.st MUST be a pipeline lane id. artifact keys MUST equal the 24-type catalog. lineageFrom/To ids MUST be artifact ids. Edit copy here, then run: node dev/meta-improvement/scripts/gen-ecosystem-map.cjs
_doc.language: All user-facing copy is Russian вАФ match the existing tone; do not translate to English.

gates.what: –С–ї–Њ–Ї–Є—А—Г–µ—В –Ї–Њ–Љ–Љ–Є—В (exit 1) –њ—А–Є COUNT DRIFT (–љ–µ—Б–Њ–≤–Љ–µ—Б—В–Є–Љ–Њ—Б—В—М counts –≤ –і–Њ–Ї–∞—Е), CHANGELOG MISSING (feat/fix –≤ consumer-zone –±–µ–Ј CHANGELOG) –Є–ї–Є DEV_JOURNAL MISSING (fix:/DEC-DEV-N –±–µ–Ј –Ј–∞–њ–Є—Б–Є –≤ –ґ—Г—А–љ–∞–ї).
–Ш–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-–≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П .product/ –њ–Њ –њ—А–∞–≤–Є–ї–∞–Љ V-* (tier-aware: pilot=—В–Њ–ї—М–Ї–Њ Blocking, mvp=+Warning; quiet-draft –љ–∞ draft).

P-RULE-02: –љ–∞ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є–µ business-rules/ —Б–љ–Є–Љ–∞–µ—В git diff, –Ї–ї–∞–і—С—В –Ј–∞–њ–Є—Б—М –≤ da-pending.yaml –Є —Б–Є–≥–љ–∞–ї–Є—В –Њ—А–Ї–µ—Б—В—А–∞—В–Њ—А—Г —Б–њ–∞–≤–љ–Є—В—М product-devils-advocate (adaptive-depth).
P-RULE-01: —Б–Є–Љ–Љ–µ—В—А–Є—П br-change-trigger –і–ї—П invariants/; –љ–∞ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є–µ IC –Ї–ї–∞–і—С—В severity –≤ pending –Є —Б–Є–≥–љ–∞–ї–Є—В DA.

V-H-04 drift: –љ–∞ —Б–Њ—Е—А–∞–љ–µ–љ–Є–µ .product/ –∞—А—В–µ—Д–∞–Ї—В–∞ –њ–µ—А–µ—Б—З–Є—В—Л–≤–∞–µ—В SHA-256 (body –±–µ–Ј frontmatter, LF) –њ—А–Њ—В–Є–≤ —Е–µ—И–µ–є –≤ handoffs/; mismatch вЖТ warn –њ—А–Њ /product:handoff --regenerate.

–Я—А–µ–і–њ–Њ–ї—С—В–љ–∞—П –њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Ї–∞ –њ–µ—А–µ–і –≤—Е–Њ–і–Њ–Љ –≤ git worktree: –≤—Л–≤–Њ–і–Є—В –Њ–њ–∞—Б–љ–Њ—Б—В–Є (non-empty .pending/, —Б–≤–µ–ґ–Є–µ .sessions/, beads in_progress, shared gitignored) –≤ stderr/additionalContext, –љ–Њ –љ–µ –±–ї–Њ–Ї–Є—А—Г–µ—В.

–Ш–љ–ї–∞–є–љ-–≤–∞–ї–Є–і–∞—Ж–Є—П MK/NM/DS/AM: YAML frontmatter, 5 –Њ–±—П–Ј–∞—В–µ–ї—М–љ—Л—Е –њ–Њ–ї–µ–є MK, ref-—Б—Г—Й–µ—Б—В–≤–Њ–≤–∞–љ–Є–µ, V-MK-08 token coverage, AM-–њ—А–Њ–≤–µ—А–Ї–Є; quiet-draft –љ–∞ draft.

App Map –Ї–∞—Б–Ї–∞–і: –љ–∞ –Є–Ј–Љ–µ–љ–µ–љ–Є–µ FM/NM/SC –њ–µ—А–µ—Б–Ї–∞–љ–Є—А—Г–µ—В –Љ–µ—Е–∞–љ–Є—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є–є —Б–ї–Њ–є AM (FM-set + NM coverage) –њ—А–Њ—В–Є–≤ persisted; –љ–∞ –і—А–µ–є—Д вЖТ app-map-pending.yaml + —Б–Є–≥–љ–∞–ї 'run /design:map --write'.

–Ю—Е—А–∞–љ–љ–Є–Ї –≥—А–∞–љ–Є—Ж—Л Integrator scope: –њ—А–Є –∞–Ї—В–Є–≤–љ–Њ–є Integrator-–Ї–Њ–Љ–∞–љ–і–µ –ї–Њ–≤–Є—В writes –љ–∞ –Ј–∞–њ—А–µ—Й—С–љ–љ—Л–µ paths (.product/, .kiro/, docs/pmo/) вЖТ stderr warn + PA-entry, –љ–Њ –љ–µ –±–ї–Њ–Ї–Є—А—Г–µ—В (warn-only).

–Я–Є—Б–∞—В–µ–ї—М –Љ–∞—А–Ї–µ—А–∞ (Phase 4.1): –і–Њ–±–∞–≤–ї—П–µ—В Pending-—Б—В—А–Њ–Ї—Г –≤ audit-index.md –њ—А–Є –Ј–∞–≤–µ—А—И–µ–љ–Є–Є —Б–µ—Б—Б–Є–Є (id, timestamp, project, transcript) –і–ї—П –њ–Њ—Б–ї–µ–і—Г—О—Й–µ–≥–Њ batch-–∞—Г–і–Є—В–∞ /meta:audit-smoke.

glossary: –®–µ—Б—В—М —Г–њ—А–∞–≤–ї–µ–љ—З–µ—Б–Ї–Є—Е –і–Њ–Љ–µ–љ–Њ–≤ PMO: Discovery вЖТ Behavioral вЖТ Tech вЖТ Build вЖТ QA вЖТ Ops/Meta.
